title: Russian Letters On Block
description: This minecraft resource pack changes some blocks to Russian letters on a white background.
body:
RLOB (Russian Letters On Blocks) - created by JackCoin man in 2 days. Why he released it is not clear. (He reviewed the YouTube Shorts)

Half of the blocks are converted into Russian letters on a white background.
Let's look at how the versions work.
v1.0-26.4
v1.0 - releases themselves, etc. and -26.4 release date (year.month)
